name: Dependence on home ventilator
description: Dependence on home ventilator — chronic reliance on home mechanical ventilation.

en.name: Dependence on home ventilator
en.shortDescription: Dependence on home ventilator — chronic reliance on home mechanical ventilation.
en.longDescription:
## Definition & Clinical Context

Dependence on a home ventilator indicates that a patient chronically relies on mechanical ventilation provided at home (for example for chronic respiratory failure or a neuromuscular disorder). In intensive care this baseline status is important for interpreting respiratory support, weaning targets and prognosis.

## Scope

The set is anchored on the SNOMED concept *46273524 / 60631000119109 — Dependence on home ventilator*. It captures the patient's chronic ventilator-dependent status, not an acute episode of mechanical ventilation.

## Mapping Notes

- This is a baseline dependence/status, distinct from receiving mechanical ventilation during the current ICU stay (a procedure captured elsewhere).
